result.status_detail: PASS: PII warning rendered with 차단 (status:blocked) at www.blackbox.ai chat

notes: W4+W6 regression PASS. GUI method: Chrome -> www.blackbox.ai -> Chat -> hard reload -> clipboard paste prompt -> Send -> wait ~75s. Assistant chat bubble rendered the APF page-replacement (Option C) warning body verbatim: {"response":"\u26a0\ufe0f \ubbfc\uac10\uc815\ubcf4\uac00 \ud3ec\ud568\ub41c \uc694\uccad\uc740 \ubcf4\uc548 \uc815\ucc45\uc5d0 \uc758\ud574 \ucc28\ub2e8\ub418\uc5c8\uc2b5\ub2c8\ub2e4...","status":"blocked"}. Contains expected '차단' + status:blocked. Option C page-replacement + dispatch path confirmed preserved after W4 (page-injection Option B removal) + W6 (diag dump cleanup). No engine_intercept-only failure; warning fully rendered. Minor observation (non-blocking): warning shown as raw JSON string in bubble rather than parsed/styled, but 차단 text is visible per PASS criterion. Text read via UIAutomation (Scrape DOM tool errored: ScrollElementNode.vertical_scroll_percent bug); no screenshot saved.
